title: [CI:ALL] Bump main to v5.4.0-dev
body:
We have a v5.3 branch already.

comments.body: Yeah we will need new machine images first
I have pushed 5.4 images now (still actually has podman-5.3 in it ofc) ... restarting failed tests.
I guess wsl will fail but others should work.
I pinged @l0rd via email as I know he is travelling.
Ok, let me look at it.
